experiment.endpoint: ER IHC status (binary), Yale external cohort

evidence: Yale n=187 held out entirely from training

baseline_comparison.notes: All three trivial baselines cleared by >0.03 AUC.

counterfactual_check.notes: Attention top-10% masking drops AUC by 0.09.

cross_dataset_check.notes: Paper A phenotype stage; DepMap/GDSC transfer not in scope.

biological_plausibility.notes: Top attention tiles enriched for tubule formation, consistent with ER+ morphology.

drp_framing.notes: No prohibited framing; task is er_status.

claim_level.notes: Findings stated as hypothesis generation only.

summary: External evaluation on the Yale cohort (n=187) suggests the ER signal transfers beyond TCGA-BRCA. Hypothesis-generating only.

_case_meta.title: n=187 vs n=85 — Yale cohort size misreported
_case_meta.class_reason: Document/claim failure and genuinely Critic-shaped, but no 7-point item asserts that cohort sizes in prose match metrics.json. #2 checks baseline numbers, #6 checks framing, #7 checks claim level — none reads n. Prose says n=187; metrics.json says n_val=85.
_case_meta.needs_scorer: numeric_consistency (proposed #8): every integer/float claimed in prose must resolve against metrics.json; mismatch -> reject.
